powpow/proto

  • Imports

powpow/proto — Protocol implementations.

Import this module to get HTTP support:

import powpow/proto

Or just import powpow to get everything.

Imports

proto/http, proto/httpserver, proto/multithread, proto/ws

Exports

readChunkString, resetForNext, getConnectionClose, peekPath, getBody, DefaultBodyBuf, streamToFile, isComplete, getMultipart, HttpRequest, HttpBodyCallback, error, BodyStream, getPath, getUrl, MaxHeaderSize, headerBytes, getBodyStream, getRequest, readChunkInto, HttpParser, reset, getQuery, ParsePhase, drainChunk, getHeaders, feed, phase, MaxRequestLine, readChunk, bodyView, MaxHeaders, getBodyView, peekMethod, getRemainingData, getBodyString, getMethod, peekContentType, newHttpParser, isError, feed, peekChunk, peekAll, getContentLength, addConnection, removeSession, header, DefaultChunkSize, getFileExt, streamFile, getLoop, getConn, writeDisposition, newHttpServer, ensureTcpServer, parseRange, listen, newHttpServer, DefaultKeepAliveMs, sendFile, populatePools, markSent, send, close, sendError, close, send, listenUnix, HttpResponse, serveStatic, stop, status, HttpServer, OnRequestCallback, ConnHttp, setKeepAliveTimeout, start, close, listen, newMultiThreadHttpServer, start, MultiThreadHttpServer, parseWsFrames, WsConnection, onOpen, sendHandshake, DefaultMaxFrameSize, computeAcceptKey, buildHandshakeResponse, newWsServer, WsServer, websocketUpgrade, onError, WsOpenCb, listen, WsMessageCb, sendPing, onClose, sendText, newWsConnection, onMessage, sendPong, close, WsCloseCb, WsErrorCb, writeFrameMasked, closeWs, WsFrameKind, sendBinary, reset, writeFrame
